mapper.select:
SELECT emd_cd, emd_kor_nm
FROM xeus.kais_emd_as
ORDER BY emd_kor_nm

SELECT li_cd, li_kor_nm
FROM xeus.kais_li_as
ORDER BY li_kor_nm

SELECT DISTINCT cbnd.pnu, cbnd.jibun, dr.doro, dr.doro as bldgNo,
st_centroid(cbnd.geometry) as geometry, st_x(st_transform(st_centroid(cbnd.geometry), 4326)) as lon, st_y(st_transform(st_centroid(cbnd.geometry), 4326)) as lat
cbnd.geometry, st_x(st_transform(st_centroid(cbnd.geometry), 4326)) as lon, st_y(st_transform(st_centroid(cbnd.geometry), 4326)) as lat
FROM (SELECT sig.sig_kor_nm || ' ' || emd.emd_kor_nm || ' ' || bd.rd_se_lbl as doro , sig.sig_kor_nm || ' ' || emd.emd_kor_nm || ' ' || bd.ln_addr as addr FROM xeus.v_kais_buld_as as bd LEFT OUTER JOIN xeus.kais_sig_as sig on sig.sig_cd = bd.sig_cd LEFT OUTER JOIN xeus.kais_emd_as emd on emd.emd_cd = sig.sig_cd || bd.emd_cd) as dr
LEFT JOIN (SELECT cb.pnu,
CASE when li.li_kor_nm = '' then sig.sig_kor_nm || '' || emd.emd_kor_nm else sig.sig_kor_nm || ' ' || emd.emd_kor_nm END || ' ' || CASE WHEN substr(cb.pnu, 11, 1) = '2' THEN '산 ' ELSE '' END || ltrim(substr(cb.pnu,12,4),'0') || CASE WHEN ltrim(substr(cb.pnu, 16, 4), '0') = '' THEN '' ELSE '-' || ltrim(substr(cb.pnu, 16, 4), '0') END AS jibun,
cb._geometry as geometry
FROM xeus.kras_cbnd_as as cb
LEFT OUTER JOIN xeus.kais_sig_as sig on sig.sig_cd = substr(cb.pnu, 0, 6) LEFT OUTER JOIN xeus.kais_emd_as emd on emd.emd_cd = substr(cb.pnu, 0, 9) LEFT OUTER JOIN xeus.kais_li_as li on li.li_cd = substr(cb.pnu, 0, 11) ) as cbnd ON cbnd.jibun = dr.addr
AND jibun like '%'||#{jibun} or doro like '%'||#{doro}
AND jibun like '%'||#{jibun}
AND doro like '%'||#{doro}
AND st_intersects(cbnd.geometry, st_transform(st_setsrid(st_makepoint(#{lon}::numeric, #{lat}::numeric), 4326), 5186))

SELECT DISTINCT CASE when li.li_kor_nm = '' then sig.sig_kor_nm || '' || emd.emd_kor_nm
else sig.sig_kor_nm || ' ' || emd.emd_kor_nm || ' ' || li.li_kor_nm END AS emd_name, CASE WHEN substr(cb.pnu, 11, 1) = '2' THEN '산' ELSE '' END || ltrim(substr(cb.pnu,12,4),'0') || CASE WHEN ltrim(substr(cb.pnu, 16, 4), '0') = '' THEN '' ELSE '-' || ltrim(substr(cb.pnu, 16, 4), '0') END AS jibun, CASE bd.buld_se_cd WHEN '0' THEN '' WHEN '1' THEN '지하 ' WHEN '2' then '공중 ' ELSE '' END || rd.rn || ' ' || bd.buld_mnnm || CASE WHEN bd.buld_slno = 0 THEN '' ELSE '-' || bd.buld_slno END AS bldg_no, cb.pnu
FROM xeus.kras_cbnd_as as cb
LEFT OUTER JOIN xeus.kais_sig_as sig on sig.sig_cd = substr(cb.pnu, 0, 6) LEFT OUTER JOIN xeus.kais_emd_as emd on emd.emd_cd = substr(cb.pnu, 0, 9) LEFT OUTER JOIN xeus.kais_li_as li on li.li_cd = substr(cb.pnu, 0, 11) LEFT OUTER JOIN xeus.kais_buld_as bd ON bd.emd_cd = #{emdCd} AND bd.lnbr_mnnm = #{bon}::integer
AND bd.lnbr_slno = #{bu}::integer
AND bd.lnbr_slno = cast(substr(cb.pnu, 16, 4) as numeric)
AND bd.mntn_yn = (CASE WHEN substr(cb.pnu, 11, 1) ='2' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) LEFT OUTER JOIN xeus.kais_manage_ls rd ON bd.rds_man_no = rd.rds_man_no and bd.rn_cd = rd.rn_cd
WHERE cb.pnu LIKE #{pnu} || '%' AND cast(substring(cb.pnu, 12, 4) as numeric) = #{bon}::integer
AND cast(substring(cb.pnu, 16, 4) as numeric) = #{bu}::integer
ORDER BY cb.pnu

SELECT DISTINCT sig.sig_kor_nm||' '||emd.emd_kor_nm ||' '|| li.li_kor_nm ||' '|| ln_addr as ln_addr, sig.sig_kor_nm||' '||emd.emd_kor_nm ||' '|| li.li_kor_nm ||' '||rd_se_lbl as rd_se_lbl,
vbd._gid as gid, buld_mnnm, buld_slno
FROM xeus.v_kais_buld_as as vbd
LEFT OUTER JOIN xeus.kais_sig_as sig on sig.sig_cd = vbd.sig_cd LEFT OUTER JOIN xeus.kais_emd_as emd on emd.emd_cd = vbd.sig_cd||vbd.emd_cd LEFT OUTER JOIN xeus.kais_li_as li on li.li_cd = vbd.sig_cd||vbd.emd_cd||vbd.li_cd
WHERE
rn_cd = #{rnCd}
AND buld_mnnm = #{bon}::integer
AND buld_slno = #{bu}::integer
ORDER BY buld_mnnm, buld_slno

SELECT st_x(st_centroid(_geometry)) || ',' || st_y(st_centroid(_geometry)) as center
FROM xeus.kras_cbnd_as
FROM xeus.v_kais_buld_as
WHERE
pnu = #{val}
_gid = #{val}::integer

SELECT sig.sig_kor_nm || ' ' || emd.emd_kor_nm as addr
FROM xeus.kais_emd_as AS emd LEFT OUTER JOIN xeus.kais_sig_as sig ON sig.sig_cd = substr(emd.emd_cd, 0, 6)
WHERE st_contains(emd._geometry, ST_SetSRID(ST_Point(#{posi1}::float8 , #{posi2}::float8),5186)) = 't'

SELECT bd.buld_nm AS buld_nm , st_x(st_centroid(bd._geometry)) AS annox , st_y(st_centroid(bd._geometry)) AS annoy
FROM xeus.kais_buld_as AS bd WHERE bd.buld_nm LIKE '%'||#{buldNm}||'%' ORDER BY bd.buld_nm
